ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_vacancy" (
  "measure_label" TEXT /* Label for the measurement (e.g., percentage of vacant housing over the past year) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State code (1 for the designated state) */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "perc_vacant_housing_1y" REAL /* Percentage of vacant housing units in the past year */,
  "numerator" INTEGER /* Numerator for calculating the percentage (number of vacant units) */,
  "denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator for calculating the percentage (total housing units) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of data collection (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Urbanization level of the county (e.g., Urban, Rural, Suburban) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "state", "county"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_vacancy_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* Unique FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code for reference */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Urbanization level of the county (e.g., Urban, Rural, Suburban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacancy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, trend analysis, comparison) */,
  "filters_applied" TEXT /* Filters applied to generate the report (e.g., county, year, season) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancy_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
